
### unsolved problem  {.smaller}

::: {.r-stack}

![](/pipeline/texfig/loadUseHazard.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-out fragment-index=2 width=1000px}

![](/pipeline/texfig/loadUseHazard.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2 width=1000px}


:::
 

* value from memory stage too late for forwarding alone
* <em>combine</em> stalling and forwarding to resolve hazard
* assumption in diagram: hazard detected in <code>subq</code>'s decode stage 

   * (since easier than detecting it in fetch stage)
